description: Call GET /api/facebook/get-profile-id/v1 for Facebook Get Profile ID through JustOneAPI with url.

operations.description: Retrieve the unique Facebook profile ID from a given profile URL.

parameters.description: User security token for API access authentication.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The path part of the Facebook profile URL. Do not include `https://www.facebook.com`. Example: `/people/To-Bite/pfbid021XLeDjjZjsoWse1H43VEgb3i1uCLTpBvXSvrnL2n118YPtMF5AZkBrZobhWWdHTHl/`
parameters.name: url
